titles.title: Jesus Wants Me for a Sunbeam

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus wants me for a sunbeam, To shine for him each day, In every way try to please him, At home, at school, at play.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A sunbeam, a sunbeam, Jesus wants me for a sunbeam; A sunbeam, a sunbeam, I’ll be a sunbeam for him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus wants me to be loving And kind to all I see, Showing how pleasant and happy His little one may be.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will ask Jesus to help me To keep my heart from sin; Ever reflecting his goodness, And always shine for him.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’ll be a sunbeam for Jesus, I can if I but try, Serving him moment by moment, Then live with him on high.
